reasoning: Naptalam (N-1-naphthylphthalamic acid) is a compound containing a phthalic acid (benzene-1,2-dicarboxylic acid) moiety with an amide linkage to a naphthylamine, making it an anthranilamide derivative. It belongs to the carboxylic acids and derivatives superclass due to the carboxylic acid and amide functional groups.
